brief_html: This message will give you data you need for SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTCHANGE (0x55). This message is used to change the password of an existing account.
format:
(STRING) Account name
(STRING) Account old password
(STRING) Account new password
remarks_html:
This message will give you data you need for SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTCHANGE (0x55). This message is used to change the password of an existing account.

You must send this before you can send BNLS_CHANGEPROOF (0x06).
